calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Petitioner Craig Elliott Pecker present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Craig Elliott.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2003 Reset To Nov-06-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Petitioner Craig Elliot Pecker present in pro per, was were sworn and examined.
Petitioner was unable to provide the court with Proof Of Publication, this matter is continued to Nov. 6, 2003 at 09:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
